summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently with no shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are planned because the job disables those paths and the listed PRs are useful, maintainer-owned/draft, proof-gated, or require normal maintainer technical review. Security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined only for their exact refs.
